_note: Copy each service into the corresponding Service post in WordPress (match by slug).

services.hero_headline: Design That Converts Visitors into Customers.
services.hero_subheadline: Stop losing users to confusing interfaces. I design data-driven, intuitive digital experiences that guide your users exactly where you want them to go.
services.problem_body: A pretty website is useless if users can't find what they need. High bounce rates and low conversion rates are often symptoms of poor UX (User Experience), not poor product.
services.solution_body: I don't just "draw" screens. I map user journeys. My design process bridges the gap between your business goals and your user's needs, creating a seamless path to purchase.

process_items.title: Wireframing
process_items.description: Mapping the structure and flow without distraction.

process_items.title: Visual Design (UI)
process_items.description: Applying your brand identity to create stunning, modern interfaces.

process_items.title: Prototyping
process_items.description: Interactive mockups to test the flow before a single line of code is written.

services.hero_headline: Fast, Scalable, and SEO-Ready Web Applications.
services.hero_subheadline: Your website is your 24/7 salesperson. I build high-performance web apps using modern technologies that load instantly and rank high on Google.
services.problem_body: Slow, outdated websites kill credibility. If your site takes more than 3 seconds to load, you've already lost 40% of your traffic. Template builders (Wix/Squarespace) often can't scale with your business.
services.solution_body: Custom development without the bloat. I use a modern tech stack (Next.js, React, TypeScript) to build websites that are secure, lightning-fast, and easy to manage.

process_items.title: Performance First
process_items.description: Optimized for Core Web Vitals (Green scores on Google PageSpeed).

process_items.title: Mobile Responsive
process_items.description: Flawless experience on every device size.

process_items.title: Headless CMS
process_items.description: Manage your content easily (Sanity, Strapi, WordPress) while keeping the frontend fast.

services.hero_subheadline: Launch on iOS and Android simultaneously. I build cross-platform mobile applications that deliver a premium, native user experience.
services.problem_body: Building separate apps for iOS and Android is expensive and doubles your maintenance time. But users demand a smooth, app-store quality experience.
services.solution_body: Using frameworks like React Native or Flutter, I build a single codebase that deploys to both platforms. You get the performance of a native app with the efficiency of web development.
services.cta_button_text: Turn Your Idea Into an App

services.hero_headline: A Clear Roadmap to Digital Growth.
services.hero_subheadline: Stop throwing spaghetti at the wall. I help you define clear goals, identify your audience, and build a technical roadmap to achieve ROI.
services.problem_body: Many businesses invest in technology without a plan. They build features nobody wants or market to audiences that don't exist.
services.solution_body: We start with the "Why." I analyze your market position and business objectives to create a step-by-step digital strategy. We define what to build, when to build it, and how to measure success.

process_items.title: Tech Stack Selection
process_items.description: Choosing the right tools for your budget and scale.

process_items.title: Competitor Analysis
process_items.description: Finding gaps in the market you can exploit.

process_items.title: MVP Definition
process_items.description: What is the smallest version of your product that provides value?

services.hero_headline: Build a Brand That Commands Trust.
services.hero_subheadline: Your brand is more than a logo. It's how the world perceives you. I craft cohesive visual identities that make your business unforgettable.
services.problem_body: Inconsistent branding confuses customers. If your website, social media, and emails look like they come from different companies, you lose trust.
services.solution_body: I create complete design systems. From typography and color palettes to logo usage and voice, I ensure every touchpoint communicates quality and professionalism.

services.hero_headline: Focus on Your Business. I'll Handle the Tech.
services.hero_subheadline: Websites break. Plugins need updates. Security threats evolve. I provide proactive maintenance so you never have to worry about downtime.
services.problem_body: A hacked site or a broken checkout page costs you money every minute it's down. Reacting to problems is expensive; preventing them is cheap.
services.solution_body: Think of this as insurance for your digital product. I monitor your site 24/7, apply security patches immediately, and optimize performance monthly.

services.hero_headline: Validate Your Idea Before You Build.
services.hero_subheadline: Save months of development time and budget. I help you turn vague ideas into tangible prototypes to test with real users and investors.
services.problem_body: The biggest risk in software is building something nobody wants. Coding is expensive; prototyping is fast.
services.solution_body: We run a "Design Sprint" style process. We define the core problem, sketch solutions, and build a clickable prototype in days, not months. You get something you can put in a user's hand immediately.

process_items.title: Validating new features for existing products

services.hero_headline: Get Found by Customers Who Are Looking for You.
services.hero_subheadline: Organic traffic is the highest ROI marketing channel. I optimize your digital presence to rank for the keywords that drive revenue.
services.problem_body: You have a great website, but nobody visits it. You're on page 2 (or 10) of Google, while your competitors get all the leads.
services.solution_body: SEO isn't magic; it's engineering. I fix the technical errors holding you back, optimize your content structure, and help you build authority in your niche.

process_items.title: Technical SEO
process_items.description: Fixing speed, mobile issues, and crawl errors.

process_items.title: On-Page SEO
process_items.description: Optimizing titles, meta tags, and content structure.

process_items.title: Local SEO
process_items.description: Getting you found in your specific geographic area.
